content.fact: Coruscant is the Republic capital, Senate seat, Jedi Temple world, and center of the political trap that becomes the Empire.
content.injection: In this era, Coruscant should feel like both legitimate capital and the place where democracy is being hollowed out.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Coruscant Late Republic Capital.
Respect story-position bounds from Late Republic Institutional Decay to Galactic Empire Declared.
antiLore: Do not skip ahead to later character, faction, relationship, location, or event states.

content.fact: Before Order 66, the Jedi Temple is the Order’s central home, archive, school, and command hub.

constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Jedi Temple Pre-Purge Sanctuary.

content.injection: After Mustafar, treat it as both the CIS death site and Vader’s bodily transformation point. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.

entries.title: Outer Rim Sieges Pull War From Capital
